<@207983230618435584> 📚 **Plain-English: seeds & scoring**
**Seed** = a random number that picks a specific combo of trading rule values. Same seed → same params, every time. We try **60 random seeds** to explore widely.
**Sharpe** = return / risk. >0 profitable, >1 good, >2 great. Seed 6 = **+2.55** on validate.
**WR** (win rate) = % of trades that win. Seed 6 = **11%** — sounds low but…
**W/L ratio** = avg winner / avg loser. Seed 6 = **12.6×** = winners are 12× bigger than losers. Math: 11% × 12.6 = expectancy +$23/trade.
**ROBUST** = profitable in ≥3 of 5 historical quarters. Catches cherry-picked params.
**Train vs Validate** = older data we search on / newer data we hold out as the truth test.
